name: part_006
file: tmp_hololive English -Promise- 2nd Anniversary Concert： Promise 2 You 【#Promise2U】 [9hMVpcDYS-0]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_006.webm

scenes.description: IRyS reacts to the massage mat and her score is revealed.
Kronii prepares for her karaoke challenge while discussing "senpai" status.
Kronii sings "Mousouzei" while enduring the massage mat.
Kronii's score is revealed and they celebrate.
Baelz sings "Fairy Tail - Yakusoku no Hi" on the massage mat.
scenes.song_name: フェアリーテイル～約束の日～ (Fairy Tail ~Yakusoku no Hi~)
